identity.name: Shieka
identity.otherProficiencies: light armor, simple weapons, pact weapon (any)

attacks.name: Eldritch Blast
attacks.notes: 1d10 force per beam, 2 beams at lvl 5, 120 ft
attacks.extra: Agonizing Blast adds CHA mod per beam (CHA -1 here, no help until you bump CHA)

attacks.name: Pact Weapon
attacks.extra: summon as action, magic for resistance

attacks.name: Magic Wand
attacks.notes: +5 damage on hit, -3 to atk rolls (homebrew)

reaction.title: Hellish Rebuke
reaction.desc: 1d10 fire when a creature damages you (2d10 if upcast 2nd, 4d10 at 3rd). Burns a slot.

spells.name: Eldritch Blast
spells.desc: ranged spell atk, 1d10 force, 120 ft. +1 beam at 5/11/17

spells.name: Blade Ward
spells.desc: resistance to bludgeon/pierce/slash from weapon attacks until end of next turn

spells.name: Chill Touch
spells.desc: 1d8 necrotic, 120 ft, target can't regain HP, 1 round; dis on attacks vs you if undead

spells.name: Mage Armor
spells.desc: AC 13 + DEX (free at-will via Armor of Shadows, no slot)

spells.name: Witch Bolt
spells.desc: 1d12 lightning on hit, sustain to deal 1d12 each turn as action. 1 min conc

spells.name: Hellish Rebuke
spells.desc: reaction, 2d10 fire when damaged, save half. +1d10/slot

spells.name: Invisibility
spells.desc: target invisible 1 hr conc, ends if attacks/casts

spells.name: Scorching Ray
spells.desc: 3 rays of fire 2d6 each, +1 ray/slot. Free from Fiend bonus list

spells.name: Vampiric Touch
spells.desc: melee spell atk 3d6 necrotic, regain half as HP. 1 min conc, repeat as action

spells.name: Magic Circle
spells.desc: 10 ft cylinder, named creature type can't enter or charm/frighten. 1 hr cast, lasts 1 hr

spells.name: Fireball
spells.desc: 8d6 fire 20 ft sphere, DEX save half, 150 ft. Free from Fiend bonus list

spells.name: Exploding Skulls
spells.desc: 8d6 fire 20 ft sphere, DEX save DC 10 for half. Slow flight gives targets advantage on save (DM ruling)

features.name: Dark One's Blessing
features.desc: When you reduce a hostile creature to 0 HP, gain temp HP equal to CHA mod + warlock lvl. Currently 5 + (-1) = 4 temp HP.

features.name: Pact Magic
features.desc: Slots restore on short rest. All slots cast at the highest level you've unlocked (3rd at lvl 5).

features.name: Pact of the Blade
features.desc: Summon a magical weapon as an action; counts as magic; can change form when summoned.

features.name: Agonizing Blast
features.desc: Add CHA mod to damage of each Eldritch Blast beam. Currently -1, useful when CHA improves.

features.name: Armor of Shadows
features.desc: Cast Mage Armor on yourself at will, no slot, no components.

features.name: Fiend Expanded Spells
features.desc: Burning Hands (1), Command (1), Blindness/Deafness (2), Scorching Ray (2), Fireball (3), Stinking Cloud (3). Always counted as warlock spells, don't count against spells known.

features.name: Dark One's Own Luck
features.desc: 1/short rest: add 1d10 to a failed ability check or save. Unlocks at lvl 6.

features.name: Mystic Arcanum
features.desc: Pick a 6th-lvl spell, cast 1/long rest without a slot. Adds 7th/8th/9th at lvls 13/15/17.

homebrew:
Magic Wand: +5 damage on hit, -3 to attack rolls.

Exploding Skulls: 8d6 fire, 20 ft sphere, DEX save DC 10 for half. Slow flight gives targets advantage on the save (DM ruling).
